questions.question: What was the step taken by the early man to collect his food?
Statement: Pre historic man went along with the dog for hunting.
options: Reason: Dogs with its sniffing power would find out other animals.
Statement is true, but reason is wrong.
Statement is wrong, and reason is correct.
questions.explanation: Book-back answer: Statement and reason are correct.

questions.question: Statement: The objects used by the early man are excavated. They are preserved to know the lifestyle of the people.
options: Find out which of the following is related to the statement:

questions.question: Find out the wrong pair:
options: Rock paintings – Walls of the caves

questions.question: Find the odd one:
options: Paintings were drawn on rocks and caves.
There were paintings depicting hunting scenes.

The paintings were painted by using many colours.
questions.explanation: Book-back answer: It was drawn to show his family members about hunting.

options: Copper, bronze, silver, gold, but not iron

Copper, silver, iron, but not gold
questions.explanation: Book-back answer: Copper, bronze, silver, gold, but not iron

questions.question: Indus Civilisation belonged to

questions.explanation: Book-back answer: Many civilisations flourished on river valleys.

questions.question: Statement: Harappan civilization is said to be an urban civilization.
options: Reason: It has well planned cities with advanced drainage system.
Statement is correct, but the reason is wrong.
questions.explanation: Book-back answer: Statement and reason are correct.

questions.question: Statement: Harappan civilization belongs to Bronze Age.
options: Reason: Harappans did not know the use of iron.
Statement is correct, but the reason is wrong.
questions.explanation: Book-back answer: Statement and reason are correct.

questions.question: Statement: The engineering skill of Harappans was remarkable.
options: Reason: Building of docks after a careful study of tides, waves and currents.
Statement is correct, but the reason is wrong.
questions.explanation: Book-back answer: Statement and reason are correct.

questions.question: Which of the following statements about Mohenjo-Daro is correct?
options: Houses were made of burnt bricks.
Great Bath was made water tight with the layers of natural bitumen
questions.explanation: Book-back answer: Houses were made of burnt bricks.
